podcast.episodeTitle: A generic pill to treat PMS (Ep. 51)
podcast.text:
Title: A generic pill to treat PMS (Ep. 51) Description:

I like to think that I make medical decisions based on science. However, science only advances when we try things that are new and unproven. If the last few years has illustrated anything, it is that science is never settled.
This podcast is like that -

podcast.episodeTitle: 316: Lip Filler Migration! Why Does It Happen and How To Avoid It
podcast.text: 316: Lip Filler Migration! Why Does It Happen and How To Avoid It Are you noticing the lack of a defined border in your lips or a "filler mustache" above the pink border? Then you most likely have filler migration. In today’s episode, Dr. Kay talks about what causes filler migration and the steps to avoid and fix it!

podcast.episodeTitle: GLOW into the Weekend: What is Filler Migration and How to Fix It
podcast.text:
GLOW into the Weekend: What is Filler Migration and How to Fix It

Injector, Anna Croft, joins Courtney to talk about a side effect of filler that isn't talked about enough: Filler Migration. The two walk us through what this is, how to prevent it and how to treat it if its happened to you. Enjoy!
